overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban underpass with neon lighting and holographic billboards, transitioning to a wet city street with passing vehicles at dusk. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with concrete structures, digital advertising, and atmospheric wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with makeshift camp

events.description: passing by bench with NPCs sitting and standing

agents.ego_description: walking through covered plaza approaching a bench with NPCs near a burning barrel

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and support beams of the urban underpass
metal barrel with open fire providing warm orange light
metal bench with two characters interacting near the fire
suspended illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
distinctive purple and yellow automated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered urban plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. A burning trash barrel provides warm light on the left, while two NPCs occupy a bench ahead. The environment is wet and dystopian, with a distinctive purple and yellow vending machine visible in the distance and digital billboards hanging from the ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underpass corridor with digital advertising walls

events.description: moving deeper into covered underpass away from the plaza area
entering area dominated by large digital billboard wall glow and red neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass corridor passing vending machines and massive digital billboards

entered.detail: massive wall covered in grid of colorful holographic advertisements displaying shifting patterns
linear red fluorescent light strips running along the concrete ceiling
thick cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the underpass, the player enters a corridor illuminated by red neon ceiling lights and massive digital billboard walls on the left. The concrete support pillars line the path, and the purple vending machine passes by on the right. The environment is devoid of people, creating an atmospheric, enclosed feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional underpass area with advertisement kiosks approaching street exit

events.description: approaching exit of covered underpass with increasing natural light visible ahead
exiting the covered structure into open air with natural dusk lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the underpass exit, passing various advertisement stands and kiosks

entered.detail: standalone digital billboard displaying FREE CIRRUS advertisement with character graphic
opening at end of underpass leading to outdoor street with visible sky

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the end of the underpass, passing a standalone advertisement kiosk for FREE CIRRUS on the right. The large digital billboard wall remains visible on the left but recedes into the distance. Natural dusk light becomes visible ahead as the exit opening approaches, signaling the transition from enclosed to open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with vehicle traffic and overhead billboard structures

events.description: exiting covered underpass onto open wet street with visible traffic
silver van drives past on the wet road from right to left
second vehicle approaches and passes by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the wet street as vehicles pass by in the dystopian city environment

notable_agents.action: silver van driving past on the wet asphalt road
dark vehicle approaching from distance with headlights on

entered.detail: tall industrial metal framework structure supporting large billboards
dark wet road surface reflecting the city lights and vehicle headlights
multi-story commercial buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
striped concrete barriers separating pedestrian area from road
elevated roadway or monorail structure spanning above the street level

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an open urban street at dusk, with the underpass now behind. The wet asphalt reflects the city lights as vehicles drive past. Metal scaffolding billboards tower on the left, while red and white barriers line the road edge. The environment opens up to show multi-story buildings and overhead highway structures against an overcast evening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dystopian urban underpass that shifts from an open, populated plaza into a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where a burning trash barrel casts a warm glow over wet surfaces and NPCs wait on a nearby bench. As the camera advances toward a distant purple and yellow vending machine, the open plaza narrows and the lighting transitions from the orange flicker of fire to the stark red glow of neon ceiling lights. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment, passing the vending machine on the right while massive digital billboard walls and concrete support pillars line the path. Finally, the space becomes devoid of people, emphasizing an atmospheric sense of isolation within the industrial architecture.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the enclosed confines of a neon-lit underpass into the expansive atmosphere of a rain-slicked city street at dusk. It begins by moving toward the exit of the tunnel, passing a standalone advertisement kiosk for FREE CIRRUS while a large digital billboard wall recedes into the distance on the left. As the camera approaches the opening, the artificial glow of the underpass gives way to the natural, dim light of the evening sky. The scene then opens onto a wide urban road where wet asphalt reflects the surrounding city lights and vehicles drive past. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering metal scaffolding billboards, red and white road barriers, and multi-story buildings beneath overhead highway structures.
